storyboard.content: My heart races and flutters, especially in the evenings when I am trying to relax.
Sometimes it feels like my heart skips a beat.
I get a bit short of breath when climbing stairs, which never used to happen.
I feel tired more easily lately.
These symptoms have been slowly building up over the past 3 months.
The symptoms are noticeable but I can still do my daily activities. They mainly bother me during exercise and when I am relaxing at night.
I am a 42-year-old woman with no chest pain.
The fluttering happens most when I am sitting quietly in the evening, not just during activity.
